title: selliguea decurrens
intro: Selliguea decurrens, also known as the ladder fern or umbrella fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selliguea decurrens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Selliguea decurrens can be prepared in various forms, including tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
